notes: Rotation, legend, and unit-type/region export fixes; UI polish

features: Resizable sidebar so layer names aren't truncated
Flash a layer's marks on the drawing to locate it (auto-scrolls to the right page)
Directional (8 angles) detection on by default
Select-all option in the unit-type assign dropdown
Collapsible Sheet Names / Assign Layers sections in the export dialog
fixes: Exported symbol marks and room polygons no longer rotate 90/180/270deg on rotated sheets
Exported legend no longer rotates or goes missing on some pages
Renaming a unit type to another type's name no longer merges their layers
Removing a unit type no longer silently deletes its drawn regions; orphaned regions now show up to reassign or delete
Region-based unit-type counts no longer silently dropped from the export when a type was renamed/removed
3-digit layer quantities no longer get cropped
Assign-layers list no longer disappears with zero unit types or once a region is drawn
